description_long: This is a black ceramic cup with a large, rounded handle and a glossy finish. The exterior is decorated with vibrant, pixel-art style graphics featuring red humanoid figures, stylized skulls, and bold, graffiti-like text reading 'Skulled.' The artwork wraps around the cup, with the main graphic elements concentrated on one side and the handle positioned opposite the most detailed illustrations. The cup's interior appears to be solid black, matching the exterior base color. The surface is highly reflective, indicating a smooth, glazed ceramic material. The cup is of standard size, suitable for holding hot or cold beverages.
description: A glossy black ceramic cup with pixel-art graphics, red figures, and graffiti-style text, featuring a large handle and a smooth, reflective finish.
description_view_0: This view shows the cup's handle on the right and a prominent red humanoid figure on the left side of the cup.
description_view_1: The handle is centered in this view, with only partial graphics and some text visible on either side of the handle.
description_view_2: This view highlights the graffiti-style 'Skulled' text, a red figure, and a yellow skull, with the handle on the left.
description_view_3: The front of the cup displays a red humanoid figure waving, a yellow skull, and part of the main artwork, with the handle not visible.
